schemes.benefit_en: Rs 5 lakh/year health cover + additional Rs 10 lakh for critical illnesses
schemes.benefit_hi: ₹5 लाख/वर्ष स्वास्थ्य बीमा + गंभीर बीमारियों में ₹10 लाख
schemes.eligibility: All AP families with white/yellow ration card

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 13,500/year investment support per farmer family (state + PM Kisan)
schemes.eligibility: All AP farmers (including tenant farmers with registered agreements)

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 15,000/year for mothers to keep children in school
schemes.benefit_hi: बच्चों को स्कूल भेजने पर माँ को ₹15,000/वर्ष
schemes.eligibility: AP mothers with children enrolled in Classes 1-12 (BPL)

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 18,750/year for 4 years for BC/OBC/EBC/Minority women entrepreneurs
State-funded house with basic amenities for homeless AP families
schemes.benefit_hi: बेघर AP परिवारों को बुनियादी सुविधाओं सहित घर
schemes.eligibility: AP homeless families not covered under PMAY
